message:
feat: adapt sqlmodel-frankensqlite for latest fsqlite API, add page-size constructors

Updates sqlmodel-frankensqlite to work against the latest frankensqlite
crate (local path patches) which includes breaking changes to error
variants and new connection constructors.

Connection changes:
- Extract from_raw_connection() helper to deduplicate Arc<Mutex<FrankenInner>>
  wrapping between open() and the new constructors
- Add open_with_page_size(path, page_size_bytes) and
  open_file_with_page_size(path, page_size_bytes) for callers that need to
  set the SQLite page size on newly created database files
- Update FrankenError::ForeignKeyViolation match arm — the upstream variant
  no longer carries named fields (was { .. }, now unit-like)
- Apply clippy suggestions: let-else for pragma_rows match, strip_prefix
  for quoted identifier parsing

Value tests:
- Replace magic float literals (3.14, 2.718) with named constants from
  std::f32::consts and std::f64::consts (PI32, PI64, E) to silence
  clippy::approx_constant and improve readability

Pool:
- Reformat fetch_add call for line length

Cargo.toml:
- Add [patch.crates-io] section pointing fsqlite, fsqlite-core,
  fsqlite-types, and fsqlite-error to local ../frankensqlite/ paths
  so the workspace resolves against the latest unpublished changes

Cargo.lock:
- Reflects local path resolution for all fsqlite-* crates, adds chrono
  and iana-time-zone transitive deps (from fsqlite-func), removes lru
  0.12.5 (consolidated to lru 0.16.3), adds windows-core/strings/result
  deps for chrono's Windows timezone support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
